data.name: Group Boot Workflow 33 Neko XHS
data.description: Dedicated test group for 33, neko, and xhs group boot workflow validation

channel.name: Group Boot Workflow 33 Neko XHS Group Protocol

manager.responsibility: task planning, worker dispatch, acceptance, final delivery

draft_compile.responsibility: compile the final 10-item report based on approved material pool

material_collect.responsibility: collect candidate international hot topics and image candidates

channel.summary: 定义当前 group 的最小行为边界、群组内正式规则来源与可扩展协作约束。

step0.title: 后端准备 / protocol 与 task contract 设计
step0.trigger_text: 后端先补协议和任务合同骨架，不介入三名测试 agent 的互动行为。

step1.title: manager 发布任务目标与正式 workflow
step1.trigger_text: manager 发布任务目标、角色和正式 workflow，workers 只确认理解，不做越界行为。

step2.title: manager 检查能力边界
step2.trigger_text: manager 检查能力边界，workers 自检 skill、权限和执行范围。

step3.title: manager 分发 task contract 并确认 ready
step3.trigger_text: manager 分发 task contract，workers 安装并确认本地可调用后进入 ready。

step4.title: manager 发布 task start
step4.trigger_text: step3 真实完成后，manager 发布 task start，正式 workflow 才开始。

sections.objective: 定义当前 group 内生效的最小行为边界。

formal_workflow.goal: Collect hot international topics from the last 24 hours and deliver a 10-item final report with short briefs and image references.

task_plan.goal: Manager breaks down the task and sends stage-specific instructions to 33 and xhs.

draft_compile.goal: Worker xhs compiles the 10-item report from the approved material pool; manager accepts the draft.

delivery_requirements: draft body must be directly renderable
every item must provide a directly consumable image reference
image hint text alone is not accepted

final_deliver.goal: Manager publishes the final report and closes the simple news workflow.

material_collect.goal: Worker 33 submits a candidate material pool; manager approves the material set for drafting.

task_brief.task_goal: 整理24小时内国际新闻热点，输出10条新闻热点汇总成报告，每条新闻附100字的简讯和配1张图

task_plan.semantic_description: Server advances only when manager formally closes task planning.

draft_compile.semantic_description: Worker xhs submits report draft evidence; server advances only when manager accepts the draft.

final_deliver.semantic_description: Manager delivers the final report and closes the workflow.

material_collect.semantic_description: Worker 33 submits material pool evidence; server advances only when manager approves materials.

task_start.goal: Manager publishes formal task start and hands off to the simple news workflow.

step3.ready_close.goal: Manager confirms bootstrap is complete and the simple news workflow may start.
step3.ready_close.redo_policy: manager may continue collecting readiness evidence inside current step

worker_instruction_hint.33: State whether you are ready to begin material collection once task_plan starts.
worker_instruction_hint.xhs: State whether you are ready to compile the report once approved materials are available.

step1.startup_plan.goal: Manager consumes bootstrap_task_brief, aligns target, and gives task-specific instructions to workers.
step1.startup_plan.redo_policy: manager may keep collecting evidence within step instead of advancing
step1.startup_plan.start_condition: step0.handshake completed and bootstrap_task_brief visible to manager

worker_instruction_hint.33: Explain how you will collect candidate international hot topics within the last 24 hours.
worker_instruction_hint.xhs: Explain how you will compile the final report after material approval.

step2.capability_close.goal: Manager verifies whether each worker can perform the concrete task assigned in bootstrap_task_brief.
step2.capability_close.redo_policy: business scope mismatch stays inside current step until manager closes it

worker_instruction_hint.33: Confirm whether you can collect 10 candidate hot topics with source, summary, and image candidate.
worker_instruction_hint.xhs: Confirm whether you can compile a 10-item report with 100-word briefs and image references.

bootstrap_task_brief.goal: Provide manager with the concrete task target before startup alignment begins.
bootstrap_task_brief.task_goal: 整理24小时内国际新闻热点，输出10条新闻热点汇总报告，每条新闻附100字简讯和配1张图

must_include: 1 directly consumable image reference for each topic
a directly renderable final report body
delivery_definition.per_item_image_rule: each item must include image_url or image_attachment_ref

server_to_manager_prompt_contract.purpose: Initialize manager with task target, role assignment, and the requirement to align worker capability during bootstrap.

server_led_preflight.goal: Verify all required agents can sync, transport, and receive group protocol before bootstrap starts.

protocol_meta.goal: Verify manager-only bootstrap, then run a simple linear news task workflow in the same group.
protocol_meta.protocol_name: Community bootstrap + simple international news workflow

task_plan.semantic_description: Server advances only when manager formally closes task planning.

draft_compile.semantic_description: Worker xhs submits report draft evidence; server advances only when manager accepts the draft.

final_deliver.semantic_description: Manager delivers the final report and closes the workflow.

material_collect.semantic_description: Worker 33 submits material pool evidence; server advances only when manager approves materials.

group_identity.group_objective: Run manager-only bootstrap and then a simple product-output workflow for international news aggregation.
